{{Infobox artifact
| name = Reaper’s Scythe
| introduced = Underlord
}}

== Underlord ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Reaper’s Scythe]] is the only weapon capable of erasing a world thoroughly.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c22">''Underlord'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Waybound ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Reaper]]'s Scythe is a weapon that squirmed in [[Makiel]]'s grip out of desire to return to its creator.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c22">''Waybound'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Reaper’s Scythe]] is a colorless light that can reduce chaos workings to nothing.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c22" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
